parentId.description: Bundled items will have their parentʼs item ID.

imageUrl.description: A publicly-accessible URL for an image of this item.

discounts.description: A list of discounts applied to this item, as an array of AppliedDiscount objects.

discountAmount.description: The total value of all discounts applied to this item (excluding coupon).

couponAmount.description: The total value of all coupons applied to this item.

listPrice.description: The itemʼs list price, as quoted by the manufacturer/distributor.

salePrice.description: The itemʼs price after all discounts are applied. (The final price before tax calculation.)

extendedListPrice.description: The itemʼs list price multiplied by the quantity.

extendedSalePrice.description: The itemʼs sale price multiplied by the quantity.

type.description: the product type - physical or digital

downloadFileUrls.description: URLs to download all product files.

downloadPageUrl.description: The URL for the combined downloads page.

downloadSize.description: Specifies the combined download size in human-readable style; for example, `30MB`.
